messages.content: •	Attending project kick off meeting with Client and Supervision Consultant. correct the sentence
•	Attending the project kickoff meeting with the client and the supervision consultant.
•	Attending project kick off meeting with Client and Supervision Consultant.  change the sentence
• I will be attending the project kickoff meeting with the client and supervision consultant.
Attending project kick off meeting with Client and Supervision Consultant - rephrase the sentence in professional manner
I am pleased to confirm my attendance at the project kickoff meeting with both the valued client and the supervision consultant.
Conducted tender’s analysis, quantity take-offs, and evaluation of risk factors -  change the sentence to add in my resume
Performed thorough analysis of tenders, conducted accurate quantity take-offs, and diligently evaluated risk factors, as evidenced in my resume.
Conducted value engineering analysis and provide recommendation to client - rephrase the sentence to add to my resume
Executed comprehensive value engineering analysis and expertly provided strategic recommendations to clients, as highlighted in my resume.
•	Assessed and implemented project plans- change to a complete sentence
I successfully assessed and implemented project plans to ensure efficient and effective execution.
preparation / verification of pre commissioning / commissioning procedure for all equipment and conducting Final testing and commissioning with consultant - correct the sentence

I was responsible for the preparation and verification of pre-commissioning and commissioning procedures for all equipment, as well as conducting final testing and commissioning in collaboration with the consultant.
support QA /QC department for the preparation of final handing over documents for client and Authority approvals- Correct the sentence
I provided support to the QA/QC department in preparing the final handover documents for client review and obtaining necessary approvals from the relevant authorities.
support planning department by providing the Mechanical procurement and installation duration for preparation of project program - correct the sentence
I supported the planning department by providing accurate duration estimates for mechanical procurement and installation, aiding in the preparation of the project program.

•	Attending technical review meetings and progress review meeting.
•	Assist in preparing project reports to Clients.
make it to one sentence
Attended technical review and progress meetings while assisting in the preparation of project reports for clients.
•	Comply with all variation orders issued through Site instructions and providing budget  and required documentation for QS to submit variation claims- correct the sentence
I diligently complied with all variation orders issued through site instructions, while providing budget and necessary documentation to the quantity surveyor for the submission of variation claims.

•	successfully assessed and implemented project plans to ensure efficient and effective execution.
•	 Ensured adherence to local and international codes of standards
make it to one sentence
I successfully assessed and implemented project plans to ensure efficient and effective execution, while also ensuring strict adherence to local and international codes of standards.

•	Preparing technical packages for materials including specification, IFC drawings, Authority approved drawings, GSAS requirements, BOQ, Tender Circular & Vendor list and send them to Procurement Department in order them to proceed for RFQ.  correct the sentence

I was responsible for preparing comprehensive technical packages for materials, including specifications, IFC drawings, Authority approved drawings, GSAS requirements, BOQ, Tender Circular, and Vendor list, and effectively submitted them to the Procurement Department for further processing of RFQ.
Reviewed changes or deviations in design scope, material quantities, budget or schedule and recommended adjustment and notify the changes to contracts department . correct the sentence

I diligently reviewed any changes or deviations in design scope, material quantities, budget, or schedule, and provided recommendations for necessary adjustments. Furthermore, I promptly notified the changes to the contracts department for their appropriate action.

•	Oversaw projects from engineering stage to final execution, including drafting detailed job cost analysis, planning material and manpower, reviewing scope of work, assessing IFC drawings, creating shop drawings, submitting and producing material, securing approval, performing site visits, testing, commissioning, and final handing over project.  prepare seperate points from the sentence

- Oversaw projects from the engineering stage to final execution, ensuring smooth project progress.
- Drafted detailed job cost analysis to effectively manage project budget.
- Planned material and manpower requirements to ensure efficient project scheduling and resource allocation.
- Reviewed the scope of work to ensure alignment with project objectives.
- Assessed IFC drawings to verify compliance with project requirements.
- Created accurate shop drawings to guide construction activities.
- Submitted and coordinated the production of necessary materials as per project specifications.
- Secured necessary approvals from clients and relevant authorities.
- Conducted site visits to monitor progress, quality, and compliance with project standards.
- Successfully conducted testing and commissioning activities to ensure operational readiness.
- Performed final project handover, ensuring seamless transition to the client.
detail study of project specification , Mechanical scope of work , Mechanical Drawings and notify any discripancy prior to start the exicution work - correct the senntence
Conducted a detailed study of project specifications, mechanical scope of work, and mechanical drawings to identify and promptly notify any discrepancies before commencing execution work.
Generate initial BOQ for all mechanical materials and consumables to generate Supplier enquiries
Generated the initial Bill of Quantities (BOQ) for all mechanical materials and consumables, facilitating the generation of supplier enquiries.

evaluate the received Comparison statement for material  according to the project requirement and specification and to provide technical recommendation to procurement department for material finalization .

Evaluated the received comparison statement for materials in accordance with project requirements and specifications, providing technical recommendations to the procurement department to finalize the material selection.
arranging Material Submittals from suppliers complying to the project specification and to submit to consultant client for approval
Arranged material submittals from suppliers, ensuring compliance with project specifications, and submitted them to the consultant and client for approval.

arrange technical meetings with Client / Consultant and suppliers and to resolve any issues before finalizing the equipment and provide all the detail schedule of equipment for Client / Consultant approval .

Arranged and facilitated technical meetings with the client, consultant, and suppliers to address any issues and ensure resolution before finalizing the equipment. Provided detailed schedules of the equipment for the approval of the client and consultant.
development of Mechanical Shop drawing for HVAC, Plumbing and Fire Fighting system and to submit for consultant approval .

Developed comprehensive Mechanical Shop drawings for HVAC, Plumbing, and Fire Fighting systems, meticulously incorporating all relevant details and specifications. Submitted the drawings for approval by the consultant, ensuring compliance with project requirements.
Preparing Final BOQ as per the approved shop drawing and to prepare Purchase order for the procurement department to start procurement process

Prepared the Final Bill of Quantities (BOQ) in accordance with the approved shop drawings, providing accurate and detailed specifications. Additionally, prepared purchase orders for the procurement department to initiate the procurement process efficiently.
Prpare delivery schedule from the supplier and to monitor delivery and to ensure the smooth availability of material on site for the execution

Prepared a comprehensive delivery schedule in coordination with suppliers, ensuring the smooth availability of materials on site for seamless project execution. Monitored the delivery process closely to proactively resolve any issues and guarantee timely material availability.
Site supervision of Mechanical work and ensure that the work been carried out as per project quality and safety requirement

Supervised the mechanical work on-site to ensure adherence to project quality and safety requirements. Monitored the progress of work, conducted regular inspections, and implemented corrective measures when necessary to maintain high standards of quality and safety throughout the project.
prepare testing and commissioning procedures and conducted final testing and commissioning and final handing over of mechanical system

Developed comprehensive testing and commissioning procedures for the mechanical system, ensuring compliance with project specifications and industry standards. Conducted thorough final testing and commissioning activities to verify the functionality and performance of the system. Successfully completed the final handing over of the mechanical system, ensuring a seamless transition to the client.
prepare Static pressure calculation, Head loos calculation based on the approved shop drawing and to finalize the capacity of the equipment .

Performed accurate static pressure calculations and head loss calculations based on the approved shop drawings, ensuring precise determination of the capacity requirements for equipment. Finalized the capacity of the equipment based on these calculations, ensuring optimal performance and efficiency.

Mechanical site engineer , supervision of all site activities, labour force to ensure the execution work is caaried out as per the project quality plan , Assisist site mechanical enginner for the assigned project for documentation and related works

As a Mechanical Site Engineer, I oversaw and supervised all site activities, including managing the labor force, to ensure that the execution work adhered to the project's quality plan. Additionally, I provided valuable assistance to the site mechanical engineer for the assigned project, specifically in documentation and related tasks.
